channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Neon & PlanetScale: branch your DB like Git
item.description: Cut local DB setup from 2 hours to 5 minutes with Neon & PlanetScale branches — the real migration order and cache traps most teams miss in 2026

item.title: AI pair programming stole my code review job
item.description: Cut PR review time 82% and Sev-2 incidents 100% using AI pair programming — precision tuning, domain rules, and the $39 tool stack that actually worked in 2026.

item.title: Rebalance pay when AI fills half your role
item.description: Raise your 2026 salary 20% with GitHub Copilot Enterprise stats — concrete numbers, Levels.fyi 2026 bands, and the memo template managers actually read.

item.title: Ship a solo project pipeline under $20/month
item.description: Ship a solo project pipeline in 10 minutes under $20/month — Fly.io, GitHub Actions, and the trade-offs you won’t read in the docs

item.title: Tame async Python before it burns you
item.description: Cut async Python surprises 89%: trio vs asyncio latency, cancellation leaks, and the 4 safety nets every team needs in 2026 production code.

item.title: Soft deletes break at scale: 3 mistakes to stop now
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with PostgreSQL 16 soft-delete patterns — when global scopes fail and 3 fixes that work at 10M rows

item.title: AI code debt: the silent killer in 2026
item.description: Cut AI code debt 60% with guardrails — AFRS vs HAPP: which debt you choose to carry in 2026. Real benchmarks, 3 concrete numbers, and the setup you can run in 30 minutes.

item.title: Core Web Vitals 2026: INP is now stable
item.description: Cut INP 65% without adding servers by optimizing event loops, Web Workers, and passive listeners — real numbers from a Kenyan health portal on $50 Android Go phones.

item.title: Hybrid search cuts RAG’s irrelevance 5x
item.description: Cut irrelevant RAG chunks 26% and latency 48% by adding hybrid search + reranker in 2026. See Elasticsearch 8.12, Cohere rerank v3.1, Mistral-7B-Instruct costs and benchmarks.

item.title: AI apps: stop building like 2023
item.description: Cut AI app costs 60% with prompt registry: versioned prompts, in-process planner, and streaming responses. Real examples from Lagos, Bangalore, and São Paulo in 2026.

item.title: MCP servers 2026: connection refused in production
item.description: Cut MCP connection refused errors in 2026: port binding, DNS timing, and Istio routing — with concrete fixes, latency benchmarks, and cost comparisons.

item.title: African devs: AI tools that work now (2026)
item.description: Save 200MB/day with AI tools for African devs in 2026: offline models, 4G-friendly options, and real cost comparisons. Find what actually works now.

item.title: AI scans your code: find flaws faster
item.description: Cut vulnerability triage time 58% with AI scanners — false-positive sources, tuning rules, and the one metric that matters in 2026

item.title: Found niche in 2026: SaaS that AI can’t copy
item.description: SaaS niches that survive AI in 2026: regulatory compliance, audited logic, and human-in-the-loop workflows. Real MRR jump from $2.8k to $8.4k, cost cuts from $380 to $167, and the exact stack we used.

item.title: AI ate my niche — 3 still safe in 2026
item.description: Cut Micro-SaaS commoditisation risk 78% — 3 niches that still pay in 2026 with real data moats and pricing benchmarks.

item.title: AI changed my workflow—here’s what I stopped trusting
item.description: Cut post-deployment incidents 67% by treating AI like an intern instead of a senior engineer. Local models, PR size limits, and diff tests that actually work in 2026.

item.title: USSD still rules: build a 2026 fintech bridge
item.description: Cut USSD latency 72% with Node 20 + Twilio Super SIM — the real tricks for fintech in 2026 that keep feature phones alive.

item.title: TLS 1.3 after PQC: latency hit you didn’t see coming
item.description: PQC TLS 1.3 added 300% latency in production until we hybridized X25519 + Kyber 768 and cached session transcripts. Here’s the exact nginx patch and Redis sidecar that cut handshake p99.9 from 1.2 s to 450 ms.

item.title: Migrate M-Pesa Daraja 2.0 now before your app breaks
item.description: Fix M-Pesa Daraja 2.0 ERR_CALLBACK_URL_MISMATCH and ERR_TOKEN_EXPIRED before your checkout breaks — 4 concrete steps, token refresh code, callback path rules, and 2026 sandbox setup.

item.title: React 19 compiler: my components changed how
item.description: Cut React 19 render time 57% with the new compiler — but only if you silence its edge-case bugs first. Real benchmarks, real bugs, and a decision table to pick the right path.
